ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the listing */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who created the listing */,
  "neighbourhood_full" TEXT /* Full neighbourhood name where the listing is located */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., Private room, Entire home/apt) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the listing per night */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the listing */,
  "last_review" TEXT /* Date of the last review */,
  "reviews_per_month" REAL /* Reviews per month for the listing */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Number of days the listing is available per year */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the listing */,
  "number_of_stays" REAL /* Number of stays at the listing */,
  "5_stars" REAL /* Proportion of 5-star reviews */,
  "listing_added" TEXT /* Date the listing was added */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the listing's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the listing's location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the listing */,
  "house_rules" TEXT /* House rules for the listing */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities provided by the listing */,
  "cancelation_policy" TEXT /* Cancelation policy for the listing */,
  "listing_images" TEXT /* URLs of images showcasing the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_neighbourhood_full FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood_full") REFERENCES neighbourhoods ("neighbourhood_full"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_room_type FOREIGN KEY ("room_type") REFERENCES room_types ("room_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the host's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the host */,
  "response_rate" REAL /* Host's response rate to guest inquiries */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Host's average response time to guest inquiries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being reviewed */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the guest */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_useful_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review useful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the guest's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short bio of the guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighbourhood */,
  "neighbourhood_full" TEXT /* Full neighbourhood name */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the neighbourhood is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the neighbourhood is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the neighbourhood is located */,
  "neighbourhood_description" TEXT /* Short description of the neighbourhood */,
  "neighbourhood_images" TEXT /* URLs of images showcasing the neighbourhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_types" (
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room type */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., Private room, Entire home/apt) */,
  "room_type_description" TEXT /* Short description of the room type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listing_metrics" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing */,
  "number_of_stays" REAL /* Number of stays at the listing */,
  "5_stars" REAL /* Proportion of 5-star reviews */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the listing */,
  "occupancy_rate" REAL /* Occupancy rate of the listing */,
  "average_nightly_price" REAL /* Average nightly price of the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., host, guest, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, login) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
